Class DangerZone

java.lang.Object
evacuation.graph.Node
evacuation.graph.DangerZone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DangerZone extends Node
Represents a danger zone node in the evacuation graph. Danger zones propagate through the graph over time, blocking edges and nodes.

Fire propagation uses two alternating sub-phases:

  • Phase 0 (edges): edges from the burning front to neighbors turn red (blocked). Neighbor nodes remain accessible but threatened.
  • Phase 1 (nodes): threatened nodes become blocked and form the new burning front.

Flood propagation blocks one edge per cycle from the zone's edges.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • DangerZone

      public DangerZone(String id, DangerZone.DangerType type, int riskLevel)
      Constructs a DangerZone at the origin.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      type - the type of danger
      riskLevel - the risk level (0–10)

    • DangerZone

      public DangerZone(String id, double x, double y, DangerZone.DangerType type, int riskLevel)
      Constructs a DangerZone at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      type - the type of danger
      riskLevel - the risk level (0–10)

    • DangerZone

      public DangerZone(String id, double x, double y, String typeStr, int riskLevel)
      Constructs a DangerZone parsing the danger type from a string.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      typeStr - danger type string (FIRE, FLOOD, DANGEROUS_PERSON)
      riskLevel - the risk level (0–10)

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the propagation state to its initial condition. Called by SimulationEngine on simulation reset.

    • propagate

      public boolean propagate(Graph graph)
      Propagates the danger zone effect by one step. This method is called each simulation tick. Returns true if the graph topology changed (triggering path recalculation).
      Parameters:
      graph - the simulation graph
      Returns:
      true if any edges or nodes were blocked/changed

    • signal

      public void signal()
      Signals this danger zone (prints an alert message).

    • getSlowdownFactor

      public double getSlowdownFactor()
      Returns the slowdown factor applied to agents near this danger zone. DANGEROUS_PERSON returns 0.5 (half speed); other types return 1.0.
      Returns:
      slowdown factor

    • getNodesToBlock

      public Set<Node> getNodesToBlock()
      Returns the set of nodes that will be blocked in the next phase 1.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable set of nodes to block

    • getRiskLevel

      public int getRiskLevel()
      Returns:
      the risk level of this danger zone

    • getDangerType

      public DangerZone.DangerType getDangerType()
      Returns:
      the danger type

    • getDangerTypeStr

      public String getDangerTypeStr()
      Returns:
      the danger type as a string
